prompt:
OK so we want to make some changes here.

First of all the promptcellar-format should not be a sub repository. We can simply remove it here and link to https://github.com/dominiek/promptcellar-format.

Then for the next release I noticed a problem in the data format. The path is not good it should be .prompts/<year>/<month>/<day>/<session>.jsonl - we should not put hour in there it is too specific and we won't have that many sessions per hour.

So please also update @planning/PLF_STANDARD_DESIGN.md (I will use this to regenerate the spec)

outcome.summary:
PR opened: **https://github.com/dominiek/promptcellar-for-claude-code/pull/3**

Two changes bundled:

**Path layout** — `.prompts/<YYYY>/<MM>/<DD>/<HH>/<session>.jsonl` → `.prompts/<YYYY>/<MM>/<DD>/<session>.jsonl`. The hour bucket was producing mostly one-file directories. `planning/PLF_STANDARD_DESIGN.md` is updated for regen of the spec — directory-layout section + the "session crosses an hour boundary" prose now reads "session crosses a day boundary".

**Submodule removal** — `prompt

prompt: Let's change the readme so that the promptcellar install is mentioned earlier? Maybe have Install before What gets captured. Break out the dev install into its own section lower in the readme
